retry_reason: The operation is unconditional on success when pointer is non-NULL; if pointer is NULL there is nothing to release, so retrying is unnecessary and harmless but redundant.
contract_summary: This is a put wrapper that releases the reference on the skb stored in dp->rx_fixup_info.ax_skb, then sets the pointer to NULL to avoid dangling references. It is a cleanup function for the rx_fixup state. Caller must ensure that the skb is not used after this call, and that this function is not called again after a successful release (the NULL check prevents double-free). There is no return value; the function is safe to call even if the skb is already NULL.
